texto: Sad that there is books that are based on bad events that has happened. But there is books that has been based on really good events. I like to read the ones that are based on both.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dawn Huntsman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Sad that there is books that are based on bad events that has happened. But there is books that h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, poems, based pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
